R_finding: No abstracts directly address MDA in plaque rupture/atherothrombotic Type 1 MI

name: Interferon-Gamma
D_finding: No direct head-to-head comparison of IFN-γ in Type 1 vs Type 2 MI in provided abstracts
R_finding: Exercise ± liraglutide reduces systemic pro-inflammatory IFN-γ in obesity; pre-eclampsia characterized by immune dysregulation and thromboinflammation but IFN-γ not explicitly measured

name: High-mobility group box 1
D_finding: No direct T1-vs-T2 MI head-to-head comparison of HMGB1 in provided abstracts
R_finding: HMGB1 elevated in acute coronary syndrome (ACS) patients; associated with adverse outcomes and pyroptosis activation

name: Programmed death-ligand 1
D_finding: No abstracts directly compare PD-L1 in Type 1 MI vs Type 2 MI
R_finding: No abstracts in plaque rupture/ACS section address PD-L1 elevation or association with atherothrombotic Type 1 MI; all abstracts concern cancer, thrombosis in malignancy, or platelet biology without direct atherothrombotic context

name: Prostacyclin
D_finding: No abstracts directly compare prostacyclin levels or behavior between type 1 and type 2 MI
R_finding: Abstracts discuss prostacyclin therapeutic use and receptor signaling but do not quantify biomarker levels in plaque rupture or type 1 MI

name: P-selectin
D_finding: No abstracts directly comparing P-selectin levels in Type 1 MI vs Type 2 MI
R_finding: P-selectin elevated in atherothrombotic/thrombotic contexts; key marker of platelet activation and endothelial dysfunction

name: Phosphatidylinositol 3-kinase
D_finding: No direct T1-vs-T2 MI comparison of PI3K in included abstracts
R_finding: PI3K activation and signaling implicated in thrombotic pathways; class III PI3K (VPS34) relevant to CVD progression

name: Tissue plasminogen activator
D_finding: No abstracts directly compare tPA levels between Type 1 and Type 2 MI
R_finding: tPA mentioned as therapeutic agent in AIS and hemostasis contexts; no magnitude of elevation in atherothrombotic Type 1 MI described

name: Troponin T
D_finding: Snippets mention T1MI and T2MI separately but do not directly compare troponin T levels between the two types
R_finding: Troponin T is elevated and central to ACS diagnosis; HEART score includes troponin as key risk stratification component for chest pain

name: Tumor Protein p53
D_finding: No abstracts directly compare TP53 levels in Type1 vs Type2 MI
R_finding: No abstracts directly address TP53 elevation or association in plaque rupture/ACS/Type1 MI

name: Glycine
D_finding: No direct Type1-vs-Type2 MI comparison of glycine levels
R_finding: No direct measurement of glycine in plaque rupture/ACS contexts in abstracts

name: SAH
D_finding: No abstracts directly compare SAH biomarker between Type 1 and Type 2 MI
R_finding: No abstracts directly measure SAH biomarker levels in atherothrombotic Type 1 MI context

name: Poly(ADP-ribose) polymerase 12
D_finding: No abstracts directly compare PARP12 (or PARP1) levels between Type 1 MI and Type 2 MI
R_finding: PARP1 levels not directly measured in ACS/plaque rupture; PARPi associated with increased thrombotic events in cancer patients, but biomarker level change in atherothrombotic MI not addressed

name: Glutathione peroxidase
D_finding: No direct Type1-vs-Type2 MI head-to-head comparison of glutathione peroxidase found
R_finding: GPX4 decreased in acute ischemic stroke during COVID-19; ferroptosis pathway implicated

name: C-X-C Motif Chemokine Ligand 12
D_finding: No direct Type1-vs-Type2 MI head-to-head comparison of CXCL12 in provided abstracts
R_finding: CXCL12 measured in COVID-19 hospitalized patients; elevated levels associated with platelet activation and adverse outcomes

name: CD68
D_finding: No abstract directly compares CD68 levels between Type 1 and Type 2 MI
R_finding: CD68 mentioned in atherosclerotic plaque/PVAT context but no quantification of change in rupture vs stable plaque

name: Matrix Metalloproteinase-2
D_finding: No direct T1-vs-T2 MI head-to-head comparison of MMP-2 in provided abstracts
R_finding: MMP-2 elevated in ACS; associated with plaque destabilization and atherosclerotic vulnerability

name: Angiotensin-Converting Enzyme
D_finding: No direct T1 vs T2 MI biomarker comparison for ACE identified in snippets
R_finding: ACE mentioned in context of ACS secondary prevention and RAS-eicosanoid axis; no direct elevation/association data for ACE biomarker in Type 1 MI provided in snippets

name: Fibronectin
D_finding: No direct Type1-vs-Type2 MI head-to-head comparison of fibronectin biomarker found in provided abstracts
R_finding: Fibronectin elevated in prothrombotic context; fibronectin-derived peptide P12 evaluated for surface-driven thrombogenesis modulation in plaque rupture model

name: ERK1/2
D_finding: No direct T1-vs-T2 MI head-to-head comparison of ERK1/2 in provided snippet
R_finding: ERK1/2 phosphorylation elevated in smoking-associated ACS and XIAP-correlated with ERK1/2 in HCC thrombosis; platelet signaling modulated in several studies but ERK1/2-specific change not quantified

name: Fibrinogen Beta Chain
D_finding: No abstracts directly comparing fibrinogen beta chain levels in Type 1 vs Type 2 MI
R_finding: FGB mentioned in genetic/thrombotic context but no quantitative elevation in ACS/plaque rupture documented

name: Transforming Growth Factor-Beta
D_finding: No head-to-head T1 vs T2 MI comparison directly measured TGF-β; general fibrosis/remodeling overlap noted but no biomarker-specific differential
R_finding: TGF-β implicated in fibrin-growth factor interactions, ECM remodeling, and SMAD-mediated fibrotic responses post-MI

name: Serine
D_finding: no direct serine biomarker comparison between Type 1 and Type 2 MI in provided abstracts
R_finding: serine protease activity in platelet activation and thrombosis; PAR4 activation by serine proteases; kallikrein serine protease role in coagulation cascade

name: Free fatty acid (15:1)
D_finding: PMID38185283 mentions metabolomics in T1MI vs T2MI matching but does not report FFA (15:1) specifically
R_finding: No abstract content addresses FFA (15:1) levels or behavior in ACS/plaque rupture

name: Kidney injury molecule-1
D_finding: No direct T1-vs-T2 MI head-to-head comparison of KIM-1 in abstracts provided
R_finding: KIM-1 elevated post-PCI in AKI patients; associated with renal injury risk in CKD; part of multi-biomarker panels for CVD/mortality prediction

name: Progesterone
D_finding: No abstracts directly compare progesterone levels or status in Type 1 vs Type 2 MI
R_finding: No direct evidence of progesterone elevation in atherothrombotic Type 1 MI; gender-affirming hormone therapy (estrogen + progesterone combinations) associated with VTE risk; SCAD case mentions hormonal milieu (estrogen/progesterone) as implicated but does not quantify progesterone levels
